raw_response_text:
<features>
- observable feature: flower has multiple petals with a distinct color gradient from light pink to darker pink at the edges
- observable feature: center of flower has a prominent, fuzzy, light-colored structure
- observable feature: flowers are clustered together with green leaves visible in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has multiple petals with a distinct color gradient and a fuzzy center] THEN [81]
- IF [flower has yellow petals and a distinct shape with three upright petals and three drooping petals] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows flowers with multiple petals exhibiting a distinct color gradient from light pink to darker pink at the edges and a prominent, fuzzy, light-colored center, which matches the features described in the rule for class 81.
</rule_check>
<response>81</response>

<features>
- observable feature: flower color is yellow
- observable feature: flower has three large outer petals and three smaller inner petals
- observable feature: flower has a dark, textured base
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower color is yellow AND flower has three large outer petals and three smaller inner petals] THEN [14]
- IF [flower color is purple AND flower has broad, overlapping petals] THEN [81]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image has a yellow flower with three large outer petals and three smaller inner petals, matching the condition for class 14.
- Rule 2 does not fire because the flower is not purple.
</rule_check>
<response>14</response>
